name: Chicken in Lemon-Plum Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Chicken breasts, boned and cut into chunks
1 cup Whole wheat or rice flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ingredients for the marinade and marinate chicken for at least 30 minutes.
2. Mix together ingredients for the batter; set aside.
3. In a saucepan, combine ingredients for the plum sauce and heat over medium heat, stirring occasionally. Set aside, but keep warm.
4. Heat peanut oil in a wok or frying pan until very hot, about 400°F (200°C). Deep fry noodles until puffed, about 30 seconds. Drain and set aside.
5. Drain chicken and dip in batter.
6. Deep fry chicken in 350°F (175°C) oil for 5 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Place noodles on a plate. Arrange lemon slices around the noodles. Put chicken in the center.
8. Pour hot plum sauce over chicken.
9. Serve.
